capabilities.description: Loop can declare MCP by name only with on_auth_defer; provision authorizes without writing Workspace mcp.json; firing proceeds when FakeAdapter authorize succeeds

hints: Run: uv run pytest -m 'not e2e' -k 'config or provision or adapter or firing' -q
Inspect tests for McpCapability without server, on_auth_defer.notify required, and authorize_mcp on adapters
Confirm provision path skips .cursor/mcp.json write when server is None

acceptance: Unit suite relevant to config/provision/adapters/firing passes
Evidence shows omit-server MCP does not require Workspace mcp.json write in tests
authorize_mcp exists on Adapter protocol; Command no-op and Cursor happy-path covered
No unhandled exceptions in captured pytest output
